form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th over 390m at this track beaten 6 lengths (22.98) behind Hartland Duke in a Grade 5 on April 6. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked off heels on home turn galloped.

form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Produced a good effort last start to finish fifth over 300m at Healesville, beaten 2 lengths (17.47) behind Hawk Magic in a Grade 5 on April 17. Must be included.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.99) at Shepparton in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 10 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and nine places from 19 starts. Looks a key chance on best form.
